name: task-log
title: task-log
desc: Keep a log of the project's completed tasks in .claude/tasks.json (shown on the Tasks tab).

name: gitmir-model
title: gitmir-model
desc: Build/update the project's multidimensional object model in .gitmir/model/: entities, server logic, API, frontend, events, business processes, status flows, reactions — all linked by id.
prepend: Build (or, if a model already exists, idempotently update it, keeping stable ids) the multidimensional object model of THIS project by following the specification below in full — including the mandatory standing rule it defines (install/refresh the 'GitMir model — source of truth' section in the project's CLAUDE.md). Write only inside .gitmir/ and that one CLAUDE.md section; do not modify application source.

name: task-planner
title: task-planner
desc: Break a goal into small task files in tasks/todo/ for the runner to execute one by one.

name: task-runner
title: task-runner
desc: Execute the tasks/ queue one at a time, moving each file todo → inprogress → done.
